meta.title: Air Force's AI-piloted fighter drones take another step toward service
meta.description:
The U.S. Air Force has given its pair of AI-piloted fighter drones official designations as they continue to mature toward service. 

Stay on top of all things Defense related by subscribing to Sandboxx!
